x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist AI-driven assignment and routing uses CI ownership to recommend the correct team. Zero ownership population means every AI assignment recommendation defaults to generic logic.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: CI Owned By / Managed By Population
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate owned_by and managed_by fields via import set from HR or asset management data. Use discovery enrichment rules to auto-assign ownership by IP range or organizational unit. Target: 80%+ of active CIs with ownership populated.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c53
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist AI-driven assignment and routing uses CI ownership to recommend the correct team. Zero ownership population means every AI assignment recommendation defaults to generic logic.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CI Owned By / Managed By Population</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaOwned.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaOwned.addQuery('owned_by', '!=', '');
    gaOwned.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaOwned.query();
    var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Ownership population cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have owned_by populated (' + withOwner + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have an owner assigned. Now Assist can route AI recommendations and escalations to the correct owners.' };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have an owner (target: 80%+). Now Assist AI escalation routing will fail for CIs without ownership data.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have an owner. Critical ownership gap — Now Assist cannot route AI-generated recommendations or escalations without CI ownership data.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006001</number>
<order>40</order>
<remediation_guidance>Populate owned_by and managed_by fields via import set from HR or asset management data. Use discovery enrichment rules to auto-assign ownership by IP range or organizational unit. Target: 80%+ of active CIs with ownership populated.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c53</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
